title: anthemis cretica subsp. calabrica
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. calabrica, also known as the Calabrian Chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family and native to southern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation. The Calabrian Chamomile is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, often used to treat digestive issues and soothe skin irritations. By incorporating Anthemis cretica subsp. calabrica into one's health regimen, individuals may experience relief from stress and anxiety, as well as improved overall well-being.
